destinations.evidence: The shared fee crate now calculates audio Phase 2 fees from delivery_result slot 6 outputDurationMs, converts to rounded pricing seconds, reads model-specific audio pricing, and returns executor-only Phase 2 fees.
The payload builder now treats AUDIO_CALL_PRECOMPILE as a supported two-phase delivery precompile and routes delivery settlements through the shared audio Phase 2 fee helper.

equivalence_argument: Mapped in the port after correcting the stale seconds wording to current downstream semantics: the builder prices audio Phase 2 settlements from slot-6 outputDurationMs via rounded seconds and model-specific calculate_audio_fees_phase2, and malformed/too-short duration output causes settlement creation to fail.

related_but_insufficient_code: prepare_delivery_settlement_transaction passes callback_delivery_result.len() to calculate_async_fees_phase2 for non-agent two-phase jobs.
calculate_async_fees_phase2 does not support AUDIO_CALL_PRECOMPILE and has no duration-based audio branch.
decode_delivery_config includes AUDIO_CALL_PRECOMPILE, but that only decodes callback config and not output duration or fee tiers.

notes: Mapped after local parity fix. The catalog wording was also corrected because current downstream slot 6 is outputDurationMs and pricing uses rounded-up seconds.
rationale: The original audio Phase 2 path was later refined so slot 6 is outputDurationMs, not raw seconds, and fee calculation uses rounded-up seconds plus current model-specific audio pricing. The durable behavior is that audio Phase 2 pricing reflects delivered audio duration and malformed duration output does not fall back to generic byte-length pricing.
statement: For AUDIO_CALL_PRECOMPILE Phase 2 delivery settlements, the payload builder must extract outputDurationMs from ABI slot 6 of the delivery result, convert it to rounded-up pricing seconds, and calculate fees with calculate_audio_fees_phase2; missing or too-short delivery output must prevent settlement creation.
suggested_falsification_tests: Build an audio Phase 2 delivery result with a known slot-6 millisecond duration and assert settlement fees equal calculate_audio_fees_phase2 for the rounded pricing duration; then provide a delivery result shorter than slot 6 and assert settlement creation errors instead of falling back to unrelated pricing.
summary: Payload building now uses duration-based audio Phase 2 settlement fees.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Focused fee-crate tests cover calculate_audio_fees_phase2 for executor-only Phase 2 fees, and cargo check validates the payload builder calls the shared audio delivery fee helper.
title: Audio Phase 2 fees use output duration
